---
title: 'Want A Better Life? Change Something!'
date: '2014-04-20T05:00:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3315309568755611542'
blogger_filename: '/2014/04/want-better-life-change-something.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Keys To Success'
---

<h3><br /></h3><h3>I'm going to be straight with you... I don't like to change.&nbsp;</h3><h3><div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">Does anyone?&nbsp; It's uncomfortable.</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">But I find change is necessary if you want a better life.&nbsp;</div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;">Lately I've been thinking about how I can make some changes in my life and routine to produce better outcomes in my life. At Work. At Home. Beyond.&nbsp;</div></div></h3><br /><br /><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/changing-the-world-by-celestine-chua-0cf4a3e5cff0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img alt="Attribution Changing the World by Celestine Chua. Quote: &quot;History shows us that the people who end up changing the world - the great political, social, scientific, technological, artistic, even sports revolutionaries - are always nuts until they are right, and then they are geniuses.â€ John Eliot" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/changing-the-world-by-celestine-chua-0cf4a3e5cff0.jpg" height="266" title="Attribution Changing the World by Celestine Chua. Quote: &quot;History shows us that the people who end up changing the world - the great political, social, scientific, technological, artistic, even sports revolutionaries - are always nuts until they are right, and then they are geniuses.â€ John Eliot" width="400" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Attribution:&nbsp;<a href="https://www.flickr.com/photos/celestinechua/9687375446/in/photolist-fL3kdA-5Yaq6z-5PKuj-6FVX9A-4di3aH-5YHV2z-6mEsYW-j82Awd-9j6H8q-8BwLZK-5qsT7j-bKhxUt-7VSspm-8MGc34-5wXPXr-7MA74s-fKZ8Vf-jam7TY-4gJ6f8-dNjmAn-94xAng-4cdmqn-kdntwH-4chkWQ-fgRjo6-8xn6Yh-5zCAMR-3LpKZf-8FAWNe-gGF7Jr-fF2prf-4VHQiz-8fmKCS-5Py8Gr-arRMAa-5PCqqh-c7A859-6HAbnE-fEe4Rw-gbAzk2-6vrwdQ-akrebw-4cdn14-77Vqwh-aMivMn-71DpBy-33X7s6-8WAVEr-5wXPjv-5qsSPN" target="_blank">Changing the World by Celestine Chua</a></td></tr></tbody></table><br /><h4>One Little Change, Then Another.&nbsp;</h4><br /><b>Garden</b>: We've always wanted a garden. My wife planned it out, and did the research. So I jumped in and got involved. Every week I take steps. The first week I ripped out the old bushes and replanted a rose bush. This week I planted a second rose bush, some asparagus and succulents and put down soil and mulch. Next Week We're planting three Artichoke Plants. All that was just the front yard. The REAL garden is starting out back tomorrow. Each week taking more small steps to the bigger vision.<br /><br /><b>Attitude</b>: I had fallen into a rut at work, saying the same things to the same people, my heart was missing from my work. So I've done two things. 1. I'm actively looking for a new job. 2. But in the mean time I'm putting as much of myself as I can into each call. Being present for the caller. Finding anything I can do to make their day better. I feel better at work, surprise, and I'm getting better sales results too!<br /><br /><h4><b>By definition "better" means change.&nbsp;</b></h4><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b></b><br /><div><b></b><b>Better means something has changed from how it was to how it now is. </b></div></blockquote><br /><b></b><br /><b>As we used to say in AA, :</b><br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq">"The definition of insanity is: Doing the same thing over and over again, expecting different results."&nbsp;<a href="http://www.brainyquote.com/quotes/quotes/a/alberteins133991.html" target="_blank">Albert Einstein</a></blockquote><br /><b>Or as <a href="http://heritagefamilyfellowship.net/about.html" target="_blank">Pastor Art Aragon</a> says:</b><br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq">"Change isn't change until there's change; if you want change you have to change."</blockquote><br />Sometimes a small change is enough to shift the balance and the rest of the pieces fall like <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dominoes" target="_blank">dominoes</a>.<br /><br /><b>Your Assignment, should you choose to accept it:</b><br /><br />Take a new route to work.<br />Read a new book/author.<br />Eat at a new restaurant.<br />Say something you've never said.<br />Get up earlier.<br />Stay up later or go to bed earlier.<br />Fill out a job application<br />Fill out a job application for a different role than you've had before.<br /><br /><b>Try something new.</b><br /><ul></ul><br /><b>Resource</b>: Here is a book that radically changed my personal and spiritual life regarding personal change.<br /><br /><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/0883687305/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=0883687305&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">Grace: The Power To Change</a><img alt="" border="0" src="http://ir-na.amazon-adsystem.com/e/ir?t=your0f4d-20&amp;l=as2&amp;o=1&amp;a=0883687305" height="1" style="border: none !important; margin: 0px !important;" width="1" />, by <a href="https://www.impactministries.com/" target="_blank">Dr Jim Richards</a>. (Affiliate Link)<br /><br /><br /><h4>Comment To Answer: What change have you been resisting?</h4><br /><h4>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><div><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/connect.html" style="background-color: white; color: #397dbf; line-height: 16.363636016845703px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Connect</a></span><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"></span><br /><div><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><i><span style="line-height: 16.363636016845703px;">Affiliate Disclosure:</span></i></span></div><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><i><span style="line-height: 16.363636016845703px;">I earn&nbsp;commissions&nbsp;off of some of my suggestions.&nbsp;</span></i><i style="line-height: 16.363636016845703px;">Full Disclaimers (<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">Click Here</a>)</i></span><br /><div><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><i>See my Store for more suggestions (<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/books-resources.html" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">Click Here</a>)</i></span></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;">To Respond Leave A Comment on This Post</span><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><br /></span></div>
